tasks.task: Audit current Mac hardware for Ornith 397B feasibility
evidence: MacBookPro18,2 Apple M1 Max, 10 CPU cores, 32 GPU cores
64 GB unified memory
macOS 26.5.1 with Metal 4
about 1.2 TiB free storage on /System/Volumes/Data
swap observed at 9241.88 MB used of 10240 MB
tasks.result: Full local Ornith 397B rejected before download.
tasks.next_action: Only revisit local full-model deployment if attached compute or memory capacity changes materially.

evidence: deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1.0-397B revision 5e3e761811e804c295c1d3c0ce68b21da6154209
deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1.0-397B-FP8 revision 8b61f97a8512d9d01bff1a9625c9a16730e115bb
BF16 repository metadata totals 793633331312 bytes
FP8 repository metadata totals 405183264091 bytes
official serving recipe targets a single 8x80 GB GPU node using vLLM or SGLang
tasks.result: Remote 8x80 GB GPU deployment is the realistic full-model path.
tasks.next_action: Request approval before provisioning, purchasing, or exposing a remote endpoint.

tasks.task: Preserve existing local AI production lane
evidence: Existing routing policy keeps oMLX on http://127.0.0.1:18080/v1 as default front door
Gemma 4 role contract remains intact
No application provider config was changed because no Ornith endpoint has passed activation gates
tasks.result: Ornith documented as candidate only; production remains oMLX/Gemma.
tasks.next_action: Validate current oMLX health after documentation/config updates.

tasks.task: Download and validate local Ornith 35B GGUF
evidence: Downloaded deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1.0-35B-GGUF revision c2e1703039380de4ce6820e97afd185682d3c16c
Downloaded ornith-1.0-35b-Q4_K_M.gguf with 21166757760 bytes
Started llama.cpp lane on http://127.0.0.1:8003/v1
/v1/models returned ornith-1.0-35b-Q4_K_M.gguf
Chat completion returned final content OK with larger max_tokens
Forced OpenAI tool call returned record_validation with arguments {"status":"ok"}
tasks.result: Ornith 35B GGUF is validated as the preferred local coding candidate when the lane is running.
tasks.next_action: Keep Gemma oMLX and Gemma GGUF fallbacks documented and available.

tasks.task: Benchmark Ornith against current local lanes
evidence: docs/autonomous-modernization/benchmark-results-ornith-2026-06-27.json
Ornith coding workload measured 57.832 output tok/s wall
Gemma GGUF coding workload measured 52.196 output tok/s wall
oMLX Gemma coding workload measured 46.452 output tok/s wall
Rapid-MLX refused connections during this pass
tasks.result: Ornith won the local coding and moderate-context non-stream throughput checks.
tasks.blocker: Swap pressure reached high levels with multiple model lanes resident.
tasks.next_action: Use Ornith as preferred coding lane, keep Rapid-MLX stopped until a separate memory window.

tasks.scope: OpenCode, Continue, Goose metadata, Codex metadata, OpenClaw, Odysseus
evidence: OpenCode default model set to ornith-local/ornith-1.0-35b-Q4_K_M.gguf
Continue added Ornith for chat/edit/apply
Goose recorded GOOSE_ORNITH_BASE_URL and GOOSE_ORNITH_MODEL while preserving oMLX host
Codex local_ai_platform metadata points to Ornith desired state and local endpoint
OpenClaw and Odysseus Docker configs use host.docker.internal:8003 for preferred coding
tests_run: docker compose config for OpenClaw and Odysseus
tasks.result: Compatible tools are wired without removing Gemma fallbacks.
tasks.next_action: Restart or reconfigure long-running app containers only when the user wants those live services refreshed.

evidence: No approved remote GPU host, API key, Tailscale route, TLS endpoint, or spend boundary was provided.
tasks.blocker: Material cost and credentials require explicit user approval.
tasks.next_action: After approval, provision vLLM or SGLang on 8x80 GB-class GPU capacity and run activation gates before tool rewiring.

evidence: Official Ornith 35B GGUF Q4_K_M was selected over 9B because it fit disk/memory and benchmarked well.
tasks.result: 35B GGUF is the local Ornith family winner for this pass.
tasks.next_action: Test 9B only if memory pressure or latency requires a smaller Ornith fallback.
